current.summary: Re-verify lint issue state before proceeding with fix

activeWork.description: Linting issue identified; assistant preparing to fix but paused for re-verification
activeWork.progress: About to fix lint issue; user requested verification that problem still exists before changes. Assistant agreed to re-check current state.

recentDecisions: Always re-verify problem conditions exist before fixing, rather than assuming earlier observations are still valid
nextSteps: Re-verify that the lint issue still exists by running relevant checks
Proceed with fix only if problem is confirmed

context.notes: Learning: Avoid acting on stale assumptions from earlier conversation state. Re-check preconditions before executing fixes. This applies to all verification workflows in syllago CLI and TUI.
